title: Cloud: Intro to AWS vs GCP vs Azure — Which to Learn
content:
### Day 196: Cloud: Intro to AWS vs GCP vs Azure — Which to Learn

**Cloud Providers:**
- **AWS:** Market leader, most jobs require it
- **GCP:** Google's cloud, great for ML (Vertex AI)
- **Azure:** Microsoft, enterprise-heavy

**Start with:** AWS (most demand) or GCP (best ML tools)
keyTakeaways: AWS: Market leader, most jobs require it
GCP: Google's cloud, great for ML (Vertex AI)
